anti_pattern: MaterialApp with Cupertino widgets mixed in
notes: CupertinoApp provides correct iOS scroll physics and text handling globally

anti_pattern: ElevatedButton or TextButton in iOS-targeted apps
notes: Matches iOS button appearance with correct press animation

implementation: CupertinoNavigationBar(middle: Text('Title') trailing: CupertinoButton(child: Icon(CupertinoIcons.add) onPressed: () {}))
anti_pattern: AppBar in iOS apps
notes: Provides correct iOS navigation chrome and back button behavior

anti_pattern: Static navigation bar that does not collapse on scroll
notes: Matches iOS large title transition behavior precisely

anti_pattern: BottomNavigationBar in iOS apps
notes: Native iOS tab bar with correct badge and selection behavior

anti_pattern: TextField with Material decoration in iOS apps
notes: iOS-styled text field with correct cursor color and selection handles

anti_pattern: Custom search bar built from Row and TextField
notes: Native iOS search field with magnifier icon and clear button

implementation: CupertinoSwitch(value: isOn onChanged: (v) => setState(() => isOn = v) activeColor: CupertinoColors.systemGreen)
anti_pattern: Switch widget in iOS-first apps
notes: Matches iOS toggle shape with wider track and circular thumb

implementation: CupertinoSlider(value: _val min: 0 max: 1 onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _val = v))
anti_pattern: Slider widget with Material thumb in iOS apps
notes: iOS-styled slider with correct thumb and track appearance

implementation: showCupertinoModalPopup(context: context builder: (_) => CupertinoDatePicker(mode: CupertinoDatePickerMode.date onDateTimeChanged: (d) {}))
anti_pattern: Material DatePickerDialog in iOS apps
notes: iOS drum-roll date picker shown in bottom sheet

implementation: showCupertinoDialog(context: context builder: (_) => CupertinoAlertDialog(title: Text('Delete?') actions: [CupertinoDialogAction(isDestructiveAction: true child: Text('Delete') onPressed: () {})]))
anti_pattern: AlertDialog widget in iOS apps
notes: iOS-styled alert with blurred background and correct button layout

implementation: showCupertinoModalPopup(context: context builder: (_) => CupertinoActionSheet(title: Text('Options') actions: [...] cancelButton: CupertinoActionSheetAction(...)))
anti_pattern: BottomSheet with ListTile options in iOS apps
notes: iOS action sheet with cancel button separated visually

implementation: CupertinoThemeData(primaryColor: CupertinoColors.systemBlue barBackgroundColor: CupertinoColors.systemBackground scaffoldBackgroundColor: CupertinoColors.systemGroupedBackground)
anti_pattern: Hardcoded Color(0xFF...) values for iOS color roles
notes: Adapts to light/dark mode and accessibility settings automatically

anti_pattern: Static Color.blue or Color(0xFF007AFF) without dark mode variant
notes: CupertinoColors provide correct iOS semantic colors that adapt to appearance

anti_pattern: Single Color value for elements needing light/dark variants
notes: Manually specify adaptive colors matching iOS color system

anti_pattern: Long-press GestureDetector with custom overlay for context actions
notes: Native iOS context menu with blur background and spring-in animation

anti_pattern: MaterialPageRoute in iOS-first apps
notes: iOS-style horizontal slide transition with correct gesture-based back navigation

implementation: BackdropFilter(filter: ImageFilter.blur(sigmaX: 20 sigmaY: 20) child: Container(color: Colors.white.withOpacity(0.72)))
anti_pattern: Opaque container backgrounds for nav and sheets
notes: Matches Apple's signature glass material for navigation bars and overlays

implementation: CupertinoFormSection.insetGrouped(header: Text('Account') children: [CupertinoFormRow(prefix: Text('Name') child: CupertinoTextField(...))])
anti_pattern: Column with manually styled ListTile rows for form-like layouts
notes: Matches iOS inset-grouped form layout used in Settings app

anti_pattern: Custom SVG assets or Material icons in iOS apps
notes: Closest Flutter equivalent to SF Symbols; vector and weight-matched

anti_pattern: ClampingScrollPhysics in iOS-first apps
notes: Replicates iOS rubber-band overscroll behavior

anti_pattern: Arbitrary padding values not aligned to 4pt increments
notes: Apple HIG uses 4pt base grid: 4 8 12 16 20 24 32

implementation: HapticFeedback.lightImpact() on button press or HapticFeedback.selectionClick() on selection change
anti_pattern: No haptic feedback on interactive state changes
notes: Matches iOS taptic engine patterns for confirmation and selection

implementation: SafeArea(child: Column(...)) or MediaQuery.of(context).padding.bottom for manual insets
anti_pattern: Hardcoded top/bottom padding for notch and home indicator clearance
notes: Handles Dynamic Island notch and home indicator on all iPhone models

anti_pattern: Assuming single platform; shipping Cupertino-only without platform checks
notes: Use platform checks when sharing code with Android to preserve correct native feel

anti_pattern: Hardcoded dark colors without reacting to system brightness
notes: Detects system dark mode and applies correct Cupertino color tokens

implementation: spring_simulation package or CurvedAnimation(curve: Curves.elasticOut parent: controller)
anti_pattern: Linear or decelerate curves for interactive animations
notes: Physics-based spring matches Apple's UIKit spring animation model

implementation: CustomScrollView(slivers: [SliverList(delegate: SliverChildBuilderDelegate((ctx i) => item(i) childCount: n))])
anti_pattern: ListView with all children built upfront
notes: Lazy rendering matches iOS table view cell reuse for long lists
